title: Lawngtlai District chhunga Lo/Huan hal chungchanga Bawrhsap thuchhuah
content:
134/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 13th April 2026:Lo (ram) hal hun a pelh tawh avangin a hnuaia mi ang hian Lawngtlai Bawrhsap chuan thuchhuah a siam.

ORDER

No.J.11013/2/2026-DC (LTI) : Order hmasa kan lo tihchhuah tawh ang khan, Lo (ram) hal hun pelh tawh avangin Lawngtlai District chhungah Lo/Huan an hal tawh tur a ni lo. District Level Committee on Fire Prevention meeting Dt.09.01.2026 in a rel angin, kangmei lakah mihring, bungrua, ramngaw leh nungcha te kan him zawk nan khapna thupek hi chhuah tul ni a hriat a ni.

Chuvangin kei DONNY LALRUATSANGA, MCS DISTRICT MAGISTRATE, LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT, LAWNGTLAI chuan Section.163 of Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksh Sanhita (BNSS), 2023 thuneihna min pek angina a hnuaia thupek hi ka chhuah e.

1. Village Council tin ten mahni vengchhunga kangmei tichhuaktu a zawng chhuak tur a ni.

2. Mi tumahin lo/huan leh leipui an hal tawh tur a ni lo.

3. Mi tumahin ramhnuaia an meichhem ti mit lovin an kalsan tur a ni lo.

He thupeh zawm lo chu Section.223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) hmangin hrem theih an ni ang.

He thupek hian Lawngtlai District pum a huam anga, thu leh awm hma chu tih chhuah nih atanga thlahnih (2) chhung a huam ang.

He thupek hi vawiin Date.13.04.2026 hian District Magistrate Seal a nemnghetin hming ka ziah hnan e.

DONNY LALRUATSANGADistrict Magistrate,Lawngtlai District, Lawngtlai.

Attachment

title: GENERAL ELECTION TO AIZAWL MUNICIPAL CORPORATION (AMC), 2026 POLLING PERSONNEL TE TAN TRAINING BUATSAIH
content:
133/2026-2027

Aizawl, 13th April, 2026: Vawiin khan kan hma lawka General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation (AMC), 2026 a polling personnel: Presiding Officers(PRO) leh Polling Parties te tan District Election Officer’s (DEO) &District Municipal Election Officer’s (DMEO) office, Aizawl District chuan Training a buatsaih.

Vawiin Training-ah hian Presiding Officers te chu Master Trainer: Pi Lalruatpuii Hnamte, MCS; Pi Esther Leihang, MCS; Pi Christina Lalmuanzuali, MSC; Pi F. Lanisai, MCS; Dr. Lalchamliani, MCS, Malsawmhriatzuali, MCS; Pu Ngurthansanga, MCS ten Poll Process & Election Forms, EVM (Theory & Hands-on) an zirtir a.

Polling parties te hi Master Trainer : Pu Obed Lalmalsawma, MCS; Pu Samuel Malsawmzuala, MCS; Pu Hmingmawizuala, MCS Pu Lalawmpuia, MCS; Pi Lalhriatpuii Phutin, MCS; Pu PC Lalrammuanpuia, MCS; Pu Lalrindika, MCS; Pu Lalthakima chhangte, MCS leh Pu VL Chaka Hmar, MCS ten an  zirtir ve thung.

Vawiin training hi Polling station 264 a duty tur,( reserve te nen) Presiding Officers, Polling Officers- I &II ten an chhim a ni.

title: AMC,2026 INTHLANPUIA “HOME VOTING” KALPUI TAN
content:
132/2026-2027

AIZAWL; the 13thApril,2026:Tukin zing dar 7:00Am atang khan General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation(AMC), 2026 atana kum upa te, damlo natna khirh bik nei polling station pan theilo te leh pianphung a rualbanlo polling station pan theilo te tana a vote thlak theihna tura ruahman,Home Votingchu  kalpui tan a ni a. Home Voting hi  ni 13.4.2026 (Monday) atanga ni 16.4.2026 (Thursday) thleng  kalpui tura ruahman a ni.

Home Voting ni hmasa ber atan tukin zing dar 6:00 khan District Election Officer’s Office, Aizawl atang in vote thlakna tur EVMs leh Materials te Municipal Ward tin te Municipal Returning Officers (MROs) ten General Observer hriatpuina in an Strong Room atangin an pechhuak a ni.

Home Voting hi AMC Ward 19-ah kalpui vek tur a ni a, Ward tinah Home Voting Team pakhat theuh awm in, Home Voting ti tura dilna lut zat hi 2769 a ni a, ni 4 chhung a vote thlak hi zawh hman tura ruahman a ni, Municipal Ward – 2 ah dilna hi lut tamber in diltu mi 209 an awm a ni.

Tukin a Home Voting Team tirhchhuahnaah hian General Observers te, DEO aiawh Election Officers & staffs te, Ward tin MROs leh AMROs te, Home Voting Nodal Officer te, EVMs Nodal Officer te, Information & Publicity Nodal Officer te leh Political Party aiawh te an tel a ni.

Hriat theih chinah vawiin Home Voting a, Vote thlak upa ber chu Pi Nghakliani, Kum 102, Dawrpui veng, Ward-IX hnuai a  mi a ni.
